summary: Vendor Auto-Assignment and Auto-PO Generation features testing completed successfully. All backend APIs are working correctly. Frontend UI shows vendor suggestion banner, POs tab in Procurement Board, and PO badges in Project Detail.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - pre-existing issue not related to this feature
Rate limiting (429) triggered during rapid automated testing - not an actual bug

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed material requests and verified auto-PO generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Auto-Assignment and Auto-PO features fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) GET /api/projects/{project_id}/vendor-suggestion returns assigned vendor for material category with fuzzy matching. (2) POST /api/site-engineer/material-requests auto-attaches vendor when project has vendor assignment. (3) Planning approval endpoints auto-create PO when vendor is assigned - response has auto_po=true. (4) POs collection has auto_generated=true flag. (5) Frontend shows: vendor suggestion banner in material request dialog, POs tab in ProcurementBoardV2 at /procurement-board-v2, PO badges in ProjectDetail Materials > Orders sub-tab.

backend_apis.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/vendor-su: PASS - Returns assigned vendor with fuzzy match (Cement OPC 53 Grade matches category Cement)
backend_apis.POST /api/site-engineer/material-request: PASS - Auto-attaches vendor fields (assigned_vendor_id, assigned_vendor_name, assigned_vendor_category) when project has vendor assignment
PASS - Does NOT attach vendor when no assignment exists
backend_apis.PATCH /api/material-requests/{id}/planni: PASS - Auto-creates PO with auto_po=true in response when vendor is assigned
backend_apis.GET /api/purchase-orders: PASS - Returns POs with auto_generated=true flag
backend_apis.PATCH /api/purchase-orders/{po_id}/statu: PASS - Updates PO status through workflow (pending → approved → dispatched → delivered)

frontend_ui.SiteEngineerProject vendor suggestion ba: PASS - Green banner with 'Pre-assigned Vendor: Ambuja Cement Supplier (Ambuja) — Cement' shown when typing cement material
frontend_ui.SiteEngineerProject material cards: PASS - Shows Vendor name and PO: po_xxx badge on material request cards
frontend_ui.ProcurementBoardV2 POs tab: PASS - Shows POs tab with table (PO ID, Project, Vendor, Material, Amount, Status, Actions)
frontend_ui.ProcurementBoardV2 Auto badge: PASS - Blue 'Auto' badges shown for auto-generated POs
frontend_ui.ProcurementBoardV2 action buttons: PASS - Approve/Dispatch/Delivered buttons based on PO status
frontend_ui.ProjectDetail Materials tab > Materials: PASS - Shows VENDOR column with vendor name
frontend_ui.ProjectDetail Materials tab > Orders sub: PASS - Shows PO ID with Auto badge, Vendor, Status (Pending/Delivered)
